title: Update eslint-config-algolia to version 6.0.0 🚀
body:
Hello lovely humans, [eslint-config-algolia](https://www.npmjs.com/package/eslint-config-algolia) just published its new version 6.0.0.
State Update :rocket:
Dependency eslint-config-algolia
New version 6.0.0
Type devDependency
This version is **not covered** by your **current version range**. Without accepting this pull request your project will work just like it did before. There might be a bunch of new features, fixes and perf improvements that the maintainers worked on for you though. I recommend you look into these changes and try to get onto the latest version of eslint-config-algolia. Given that you have a decent test suite, a passing build is a strong indicator that you can take advantage of these changes by merging the proposed change into your project. Otherwise this branch is a great starting point for you to work on the update. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 47 commits . - [`e1b8a56`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/e1b8a56ebd98167d4ab55477c31b50c4a9f3e470) release v6.0.0 - [`ce194dd`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/ce194dd69349ac4b7e10b36db166708958f1555f) feat(rules): new default rules - [`a6509f4`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/a6509f468b38335c809a6dda3043cb3cc16a35a7) Merge pull request #23 from algolia/greenkeeper-eslint-3.7.0 - [`4a7b30e`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/4a7b30e104dd3a11c1cee60fee43dcd5918c805e) chore(package): update eslint to version 3.7.0 - [`24018b2`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/24018b21f5f571368d36b804e9f0afbada5477dd) Merge pull request #21 from algolia/greenkeeper-babel-eslint-7.0.0 - [`7196720`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/7196720e50a79c9b114ea3ed1d980a06263c95d2) chore(package): update babel-eslint to version 7.0.0 - [`e2fc831`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/e2fc831fad4804e94d6963bf63729372555336a9) Merge pull request #20 from algolia/greenkeeper-eslint-3.6.1 -
